meta.note: Daffy charges no separate investment-management fee beyond membership dues. Portfolios rebalance daily on market days and can be changed anytime from account settings.
meta.disclaimer: This is an educational suggestion based on the preferences you shared, not investment advice. Consider consulting a licensed financial professional before investing.
meta.riskTier: Ordinal 1-4 used for facet matching: 1 = capital preservation, 2 = balanced (50/50), 3 = growth (75/25), 4 = aggressive (90/10). Crypto and Custom are tagged separately.
meta.holdingWeightsAndExpenseRatios: weight is percent of portfolio; expenseRatioPct is the fund's annual expense ratio in percent. weightedExpenseRatioPct is the portfolio's blended annual expense ratio.

categories.label: Conservative
categories.blurb: Bond-only mixes that prioritize protecting principal over growth.

categories.label: Standard
categories.blurb: Globally diversified stock-and-bond blends across three risk levels.

categories.label: ESG
categories.blurb: The Standard risk levels, screened for environmental, social, and governance criteria.

categories.label: Crypto
categories.blurb: Diversified blends with a crypto sleeve, plus single-asset and stablecoin options.

categories.label: Custom
categories.blurb: Build your own from 680+ ETFs and 2,500+ stocks, up to 20 holdings.

portfolios.name: Treasury Reserve
portfolios.description: Holds only short-term U.S. Treasury bills. The steadiest option, built to protect principal for funds you expect to grant out soon.
portfolios.bestFor: Money you plan to give away in the near term.

portfolios.name: Inflation-Protected Bonds
portfolios.description: Treasury inflation-protected securities that keep pace with rising prices, for conservative balances you want shielded from inflation rather than grown aggressively.
portfolios.bestFor: Cautious balances where inflation is the main worry.

portfolios.name: Diversified Bonds

holdings.name: Goldman Sachs Access Treasury 0-1 Year ETF
iShares 0-5 Year High Yield Corporate Bond ETF
iShares Broad USD High Yield Corporate Bond ETF
SPDR Bloomberg Investment Grade Floating Rate ETF

portfolios.description: A spread of short- and long-term, government and high-yield bonds. Low volatility with a touch more yield than Treasuries alone, a sensible default for cautious givers.
portfolios.bestFor: A steady, low-volatility default for short horizons.

portfolios.name: Balanced
portfolios.description: An even split of global stocks and bonds. Modest growth with a cushion against market swings, suited to medium horizons or an undecided risk appetite.
portfolios.bestFor: Medium horizons or when risk preference is unclear.

portfolios.name: Growth
portfolios.description: Three-quarters global equities, one-quarter bonds. Tilts toward long-term growth while keeping some ballast, a fit for funds you will grow over several years.
portfolios.bestFor: Funds you'll grow over years with a moderate risk appetite.

portfolios.name: Aggressive
portfolios.description: Almost entirely global equities. Maximizes long-run growth and accepts bigger swings, for patient balances with a long runway.
portfolios.bestFor: Long horizons and an appetite for volatility.

portfolios.name: Conservative ESG

holdings.name: iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF
iShares ESG Aware U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EAFE ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EM ETF

portfolios.description: A balanced stock-and-bond mix screened for environmental, social, and governance criteria, including green bonds. Steady growth that reflects sustainability values.
portfolios.bestFor: Sustainability-minded givers wanting a balanced mix.

portfolios.name: Moderate ESG

holdings.name: iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EAFE ETF
iShares ESG Aware U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EM ETF

portfolios.description: Growth-leaning ESG-screened global equities anchored by ESG and green bonds. Keeps investments aligned to environmental and social standards while reaching for growth.
portfolios.bestFor: Sustainability values with a multi-year growth horizon.

portfolios.name: Aggressive ESG

holdings.name: iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EAFE ETF
iShares ESG Aware MSCI EM ETF
iShares ESG Aware U.S. Aggregate Bond ETF

portfolios.description: Nearly all ESG-screened global equities. Maximum long-term growth for sustainability-minded givers with a long horizon.
portfolios.bestFor: Sustainability values, long horizon, high risk tolerance.

portfolios.name: Diversified Conservative
portfolios.description: A mainstream stock-and-bond core with a small 5% sleeve of diversified crypto, for givers curious about digital assets without betting the fund on them.
portfolios.bestFor: Crypto-curious givers who still want a diversified base.

portfolios.name: Diversified Aggressive
portfolios.description: A growth-oriented stock-and-bond base with a 10% diversified-crypto allocation, for those who want meaningful digital-asset exposure inside a diversified fund.
portfolios.bestFor: Higher risk tolerance and a deliberate crypto allocation.

portfolios.name: Blended
portfolios.description: A pure digital-asset basket weighted toward Bitcoin, with Ethereum and Solana. Highly volatile and only for explicitly crypto-focused givers.
portfolios.bestFor: Givers who specifically want broad crypto exposure.

portfolios.name: Bitcoin
portfolios.description: A single-asset Bitcoin position. Highly volatile, for givers who specifically want Bitcoin exposure.

portfolios.name: Ethereum
portfolios.description: A single-asset Ethereum position. Highly volatile, for givers who specifically want Ethereum exposure.

portfolios.name: Solana
portfolios.description: A single-asset Solana position. Highly volatile, for givers who specifically want Solana exposure.

portfolios.name: USDC
portfolios.description: A U.S.-dollar stablecoin held one-to-one. Minimal price volatility, a way to keep a crypto-rails balance steady.
portfolios.bestFor: Holding a crypto-rails balance without price swings.

custom.name: Custom
custom.description: Build your own portfolio of up to 20 holdings from 680+ low-cost ETFs and 2,500+ individual stocks. Best when you have specific holdings in mind, strong investing opinions, or constraints the standard portfolios don't capture.
custom.bestFor: Specific holdings, named ETFs, or unusual constraints.

selection.description: Deterministic facet -> portfolio mapping for report section 'Where your giving fund lives' (BRIEF.md §7.6). No LLM call. Evaluate rules top to bottom; first match wins. Inputs are derived from the captured facets.

inputs.cryptoMentioned: true only if the user EXPLICITLY mentioned crypto/Bitcoin/Ethereum/etc. in values_text or elsewhere. Never inferred, never default.
inputs.namedCoin: one of bitcoin|ethereum|solana|usdc if the user named a specific coin, else null.
inputs.highlySpecific: true if the user expressed unusual exclusions, named individual holdings/ETFs, or strong opinions about investing.
inputs.esgSignal: true if causes include environment/climate OR values_text is ESG-adjacent (sustainability, climate, clean energy, social responsibility).
inputs.horizon: facet horizon: year_by_year | multi_year | lifetime | legacy | null
inputs.risk: facet risk: proven | balanced | experimental | null

rules.recommend: if namedCoin then crypto-<namedCoin>; else if risk === 'experimental' then crypto-diversified-aggressive; else crypto-diversified-conservative
rules.reasonTemplate: Because you specifically mentioned crypto, this keeps a diversified core with a measured digital-asset sleeve.
Your preferences are specific enough that a custom portfolio of hand-picked holdings will fit better than a standard mix.

rules.recommend: horizon === 'year_by_year' ? esg-conservative : (tier 4 -> esg-aggressive, tier 3 -> esg-moderate, else esg-conservative)
rules.reasonTemplate: Your values point toward sustainability, so this matches your risk level with an ESG-screened mix.
Since you plan to give as you go, this protects your balance for near-term grants.

rules.recommend: tier 4 -> standard-aggressive, tier 3 -> standard-growth, else standard-balanced
rules.reasonTemplate: Because you'll grow your fund over time, this leans into growth at your risk level.

rules.recommend: tier 4 -> standard-aggressive, tier 3 -> standard-growth, else standard-balanced
rules.reasonTemplate: This balances growth and stability based on the risk level you described.

fallbackWhenHorizonUnknown.description: BRIEF.md §7.6: if horizon is unknown, present a fork as guidance rather than a single pick.

selection.omitSectionWhen: No confident match (e.g. no horizon, no risk, no values signal). BRIEF.md §7.6: any uncertainty -> omit the section entirely rather than guess.
